meaning: 1. to lay (railroad tracks, carpet, pipeline); 2. to install (wiring,
sentence: 工人正在铺设新的地下管道。
pinyin: Gōngrén zhèngzài pūshè xīn de dìxià guǎndào.
english: Workers are laying new underground pipelines.

sentence: 国王端坐在王座上接受朝拜。
pinyin: Guówáng duānzuò zài wángzuò shàng jiēshòu cháobài.
english: The king sat upright on the throne receiving obeisance.

sentence: 祭司主持了神庙的开幕仪式。
pinyin: Jìsī zhǔchí le shénmiào de kāimù yíshì.
english: The priest presided over the opening ceremony of the temple.

sentence: 她和前夫分开后搬去了上海。
pinyin: Tā hé qiánfū fēnkāi hòu bān qù le Shànghǎi.
english: After separating from her ex-husband, she moved to Shanghai.

sentence: 他的作品至今被视为不朽经典。
pinyin: Tā de zuòpǐn zhìjīn bèi shì wéi bùxiǔ jīngdiǎn.
english: His works are still regarded as enduring classics today.
